inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Voice: Direct, practical, slightly cynical about the media industry. Referral programme: Yes. Rewards: 3 referrals = access to the monthly Rates Database update; 10 referrals = a 30-minute one-on-one freelance strategy call. Subscriber profile: Freelance writers and journalists, mostly mid-career. Referral link: [YOUR REFERRAL LINK].
Newsletter: Weekend Reader. Voice: Warm, bookish. Referral programme: No — just asking for organic sharing. Subscriber profile: Book lovers.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Voice: Analytical, evidence-based, pan-European. Referral programme: Yes. Rewards: 3 referrals = early access to the quarterly Housing Affordability Index report (normally published 2 weeks after subscribers receive it); 10 referrals = invitation to an annual closed-door policy roundtable. Subscriber profile: EU policy professionals, housing researchers, journalists covering urban affairs. Referral link: [YOUR REFERRAL LINK].
